# CI and Deployment

Internal reference for project maintainers.

## Workflows

### `build`

Triggers on push to `main` and on pull requests targeting `main`.

Runs on `windows-latest` (required for vatSys dependency). Invokes the following NUKE targets:

- `CompilePlugin` - builds the vatSys plugin
- `CompileServer` - builds the server binary
- `CompileTools` - builds the CLI tools
- `Test` - runs all test projects (Contracts, Core, Plugin, Server)

This workflow must pass before a PR can be merged. It does not use any secrets and cannot trigger a deployment.

> **Note:** `build.yml` is auto-generated by NUKE from the `[GitHubActions]` attribute in `source/build/Build.cs`. Manual edits will be overwritten if the configuration is regenerated via `nuke --generate-configuration GitHubActions_build`.

### `release`

Triggers on tag pushes matching `v*`. Runs on `windows-latest`.

Invokes the NUKE `Release` target, which:
1. Builds and packages the plugin, server, and CLI tools
2. Creates a GitHub release for the tag with generated release notes
3. Attaches the plugin zip, server zip, and per-platform CLI tool zips as release assets

Requires the `GITHUB_TOKEN` secret (automatically available in Actions).

### `deploy-container`

Triggers on tag pushes matching `v*`. Runs on `ubuntu-latest`.

Invokes the NUKE `PushDockerImage` target, which:
1. Builds the Docker image, passing the version derived from GitVersion as a `VERSION` build arg
2. Tags the image as both `ghcr.io/yukitsune/vmaestro:<version>` and `ghcr.io/yukitsune/vmaestro:latest`
3. Pushes both tags to GitHub Container Registry (GHCR)

Requires `GITHUB_TOKEN` with `packages: write` and `contents: write` permissions.

### `deploy`

Triggers when `deploy-container` completes successfully. Runs on `ubuntu-latest`.

1. Checks out the repo at the commit that triggered `deploy-container`
2. Updates the DigitalOcean app spec from `.do/app.yaml`
3. Triggers a new deployment of the app

Requires `DIGITALOCEAN_ACCESS_TOKEN` and `DIGITALOCEAN_APP_ID` repository secrets.

This workflow is intentionally decoupled from `deploy-container` via `workflow_run` to ensure the Docker image exists in GHCR before DigitalOcean attempts to pull it.

## Releasing

To cut a release, use Nuke to calculate the version and tag the commit

```sh
nuke create-release
```

This will use [GitVersion](https://gitversion.net) to calculate the version number based on the commit messages, tag the current commit with the calculated version, and push the tag.

When the tag is pushed, the `release` and `deploy-container` workflows in GitHub Actions will execute in parallel, followed by `deploy` once the container is pushed.

## DigitalOcean App

The app spec is defined in `.do/app.yaml`. It hosts two services:

| Service | Source | Description |
|---------|--------|-------------|
| `docs` | Built from `docs/Dockerfile` on the `main` branch | Public documentation site |
| `vatpac` | Pulled from `ghcr.io/yukitsune/vmaestro:latest` | Maestro server for VATPAC |

The `vatpac` service is updated on every release via the `deploy` workflow. The `docs` service is rebuilt by DigitalOcean from source when a deployment is triggered.

The app spec is applied via `doctl apps update` on each deployment, so `.do/app.yaml` is the source of truth for the app configuration.

## Secrets

| Secret | Used by | Description |
|--------|---------|-------------|
| `GITHUB_TOKEN` | `release`, `deploy-container` | Auto-provisioned by GitHub Actions |
| `DIGITALOCEAN_ACCESS_TOKEN` | `deploy` | Personal access token for `doctl` |
| `DIGITALOCEAN_APP_ID` | `deploy` | ID of the DigitalOcean app to deploy |
